recentNotes.note: P6-S2 accepted after planner retrieval and refinement validation and review; apps/api now exposes authenticated GET /plans/:id and POST /plans/:id/refine endpoints with user-scoped access, explicit template revision lineage, Claude-backed refinement, preserved calendar bindings for refined revisions, sanitized carried-forward overrides, and migration-backed regression coverage for ownership, invalid refined output, and revision history.

P6-S1 accepted after planner validation and review; apps/api now exposes an authenticated POST /plans route that loads the caller's saved profile, generates a structured meal plan through the Claude layer, validates requested slots and sequential day numbering, persists meal plan templates plus optional dated instances, and rejects missing-profile, invalid-generation, and invalid-start-date cases with planner-specific errors and regression coverage.

P5-S3 accepted after mobile onboarding validation and review; apps/mobile now exposes an authenticated onboarding chat screen with structured profile review, explicit confirmation and revision paths, dashboard entry points for empty and existing profiles, cache-backed profile refresh, and regression coverage for loading, retry, allergy visibility, and save/revise race serialization.

P5-S2 accepted after onboarding endpoint validation and review; apps/api now exposes an authenticated onboarding chat route with transcript persistence, structured profile extraction, explicit partial/invalid handling, user-scoped transcript/profile linkage, concurrency-safe draft management, and Drizzle-backed migration metadata for the single-active-draft invariant.

P5-S1 accepted after backend AI foundation validation and review; apps/api now provides a reusable Claude client, prompt templates, model routing, parser fallback, optional Anthropic startup wiring, and validated partial-profile extraction for incomplete onboarding transcripts without fabricating sensitive fields.

P4-S3 accepted after mobile dashboard validation and review; apps/mobile now fetches the authenticated backend profile for the signed-in home screen, shows placeholder planning and shopping actions, and caches only a non-sensitive dashboard summary locally for offline-friendly relaunches while live null responses clear stale cache.

P4-S2 accepted after mobile auth validation and review; apps/mobile now supports Google Sign-In, backend token exchange, secure backend-session persistence, restore on relaunch, and logout without treating Google tokens as durable app auth state.

P4-S1 accepted after mobile scaffold validation and review; apps/mobile now contains an Android-first React Native shell with navigation, Zustand state, React Query health wiring, bundled runtime config integration, design tokens, mobile tests, and an Android smoke command that compiles the native project.

P3-S3 accepted after profile validation and review; apps/api now verifies app sessions for protected routes and exposes secure profile read/update endpoints with user-scoped persistence, explicit sensitive-field handling, and integration coverage for authorized, unauthorized, and validation-failure flows.

P3-S2 accepted after auth validation and review; apps/api now verifies Google ID tokens server-side, upserts local users, and issues backend-scoped app JWT session material through POST /auth/google with coverage for valid, invalid, expired, and repeat-sign-in flows.
